events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll write the assessment JSON directly. This is a code/submittal compliance judgment, so the output will treat the wrong cable jacket rating in the space as a failed rough-in condition.

events.label: shell
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && ls -la && cat > /app/answer.json <<'EOF'
{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"high\",
  \"work_stage\": \"rough-complete\",
  \"component_conditions\": [
    \"installed-defective\",
    \"non-compliant\"
  ],
  \"percent_complete\": 80,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.9,
  \"event_time\": 0.0,
  \"rate\": 0.0,
  \"order\": [],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"Cable jacket rating does not match the environmental space where installed.\",
    \"Riser-rated cable appears to be installed in a plenum or other air-handling space where plenum-rated communications cable is required.\",
    \"Installed data/comm-security cabling is not acceptable for close-in until cable type and routing are corrected or verified by approved submittal and inspection.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Stop cover-up of affected pathways and ceilings until corrected.\",
    \"Trace and identify all affected cable runs by jacket marking and space classification.\",
    \"Remove and replace non-rated cable with plenum-rated cable where routed through plenum or environmental air spaces, or reroute through an approved raceway/pathway allowed by NEC 800 and project submittals.\",
    \"Document correction and obtain electrical/low-voltage inspection approval before close-in.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"The measurable condition is the cable listing/marking versus the space classification. Communications cable must have a jacket rating suitable for the space it occupies; riser cable is not interchangeable with plenum cable in an air-handling/plenum space. Because the rough-in is installed with the wrong cable type for the space, it is out of tolerance, non-compliant, and must fail inspection before concealment.\",
  \"references\": [
    \"NEC Article 800 communications circuits: cable listing and permitted uses in plenums, risers, and other environmental air spaces\",
    \"TIA-568 structured cabling requirements: use listed, properly rated cabling consistent with the installation environment and project specifications\"
  ]
}
EOF
python3 -m json.tool /app/answer.json >/dev/null
cat /app/answer.json"
